CONTENT.Club career: Gouano made his professional debut on 6 November 2018 in the UEFA Champions League group stage against Club Brugge. He replaced Radamel Falcao after 61 minutes in a 4–0 home loss.On 2 September 2021, he signed a contract with Aarau in Switzerland until the end of 2021. The contract was not extended beyond the original expiration date.
CONTENT.External links: Gobé Gouano at the French Football Federation (in French)Gobé Gouano at the French Football Federation (archived) (in French)AS Monaco profile
CONTENT.International career: Born in France, Gouano holds French and Ivorian nationalities. He is a youth international for France.

SUMMARY: Gobé Gouano (born 10 December 2000) is a French professional footballer who plays as a midfielder.
